enabled.description: Master off-switch for the orchestrator extension. When false, the extension contributes no CLI verbs, no HTTP routes, and no expiry sweeper.

mode.description: Dispatch mode. 'synthetic' (default) runs the routing engine and writes task records but never invokes sessions_spawn — Pipeline tab renders without touching specialists. 'shadow' invokes real spawn but bypasses operator approval and writes to a separate archive. 'live' is the production mode.
